extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE Arnaud won the final sprint stage after FDJ held the front from 4km out, surviving KRISTOFF/SAGAN disrupting GAVIRIA's leadout.
tactical_patterns: FDJ controlled from 4km unusually early, no team countered, allowing DÉMARE to freeload on Quick-Step's late surge.
KRISTOFF physically pushed SAGAN off Quick-Step train in final kilometer, eliminating both from contention through infighting.
DUNBAR most aggressive from break on sprint stage, Aqua Blue Pro Continental strategy targets every breakaway for exposure.
Sprinter teams collectively leashed break under 90 seconds early, preventing any upset on penultimate flat stage.

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: Capitalized on team control and rival disruption, fastest in drag race with GAVIRIA from 200m
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: neutral: Quick-Step train executed perfectly but DÉMARE matched speed in final straight after slotting behind
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: Desperate pre-Tour tactics, physically disrupting SAGAN showed lack of speed confidence rather than smart positioning
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Freelancing without train, eliminated by KRISTOFF's interference, lost key positioning battle at 5km
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: negative: Tenth place with PORTE twelfth demonstrates severe form deficit heading into Tour de France
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: Tenth without leadout reveals Sunweb lacks sprint organization if splitting resources between GC and sprints
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: New Aqua Blue signing most tenacious in breakaway survival battle, team executing Pro Continental visibility strategy
rider_signals.BROWN Nathan: neutral: Attacked once from doomed sprint-stage break then abandoned effort, efficient TV time strategy
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: Twelfth in sprint finish while leading GC signals excellent form before 34km TT
rider_signals.ŠPILAK Simon: neutral: 1:28 down but 55s lost in Astana TTT failure, actual form closer to PORTE than GC suggests
